fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly removes a duplicate value from the end of the merged list on line 82 when the last elements of both input streams are identical. This violates the requirement to preserve all duplicates.

constraints.intent: The total number of prices in the merged stream must equal the sum of the counts from the input streams.
This conditional block, which removes a trailing duplicate, should never be executed.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition that triggers the erroneous removal of an element should not be met before the check.
The final merged list must contain the sum of elements from both input lists.
